jsonLd.title: Principal Instructional Designer at Adda247
jsonLd.description:
Adda247 invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Visakhapatnam location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Adda247:
Adda247 is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adda247!
